title: Queen's King
overview: "Queen's King," tells the unlikely love story of an odd Afro-Haitian couple Ram and Nefe in Florida. Their journey begins when Nefe (Geegee Rock) defies her Christian beliefs to pursue a crush on Ram (Mecca "Grimo") an aspiring rap artist.
